summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Shape Inexplicavel fitness/habit companion app. All backend APIs working (100% success rate), frontend functional with proper navigation and AI chat integration. Demo user login successful.

ui_bugs.issue: Bottom navigation overlay sometimes prevents clicks without force option

passed_tests: Chat operations (get threads, send message, receive AI response)
Home page navigation and greeting display
Mission card, macros card, water card display
Chat message sending and AI response
Meal creation and display in list
Water progress tracking and quick add
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (21/21 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (1 minor overlay issue)
